hero.ariaPhoto: Julien Lange, senior JavaScript developer freelance
hero.ariaGithub: Julien Lange's GitHub profile (opens in a new tab)
hero.ariaLinkedin: Julien Lange's LinkedIn profile (opens in a new tab)
hero.subtitle: Web Components, Design System & Fullstack
hero.pitch: I build Web interfaces that stand the test of time. During 5 years at Fnac Darty, I learned that a good component isn't one that works — it's one that three different teams can use without calling you.

fnac-darty.pitch: Long-term mission on fnac.com, France's leading e-commerce site, on the most visited pages: product pages, homepage, sub-homes, search results (~100,000 views/day on search results, ~50,000 on homepage). Stack: ASP.NET/Razor + JavaScript ES6+/Web Components on-prem, progressive migration to a cloud Azure architecture (server-side micro-frontends).

web-components-lib.title: Internal Web Components Library
web-components-lib.description: Creation and maintenance of an internal NPM library of 20 to 30 UI components in native Custom Elements, consumed by 3 front-end teams. Migration from a proprietary component architecture to the native Web Components spec. Creation of shared packages (SCSS design tokens, common ESLint/Babel configs) — the foundation of a Design System.

migration-cloud.title: Cloud Migration (M2C)
migration-cloud.description: Migration of Home/Sub-home layers to a server-side MFE framework (UI fragments, Razor tag helpers, Kafka/Cosmos DB pipeline), migration of Liquid templates to CSHTML, CSS Less → SCSS migration.

smile.title: SMILE CMS Redesign
smile.description: Autonomous Figma mockup design and complete technical front-end overhaul, deployed in production and used by ~50 editors across 8 markets (FR, BE-FR, BE-NL, CH-FR, CH-DE, ES, PT, Fnac Pro).

kamino.title: Kamino — Ad Integration
kamino.description: Integration of 7 on-site ad formats (video, display, native) desktop/mobile, with complete analytics tracking.

arrow.title: Arrow — Marketplace Seller
arrow.description: Front-end integration of marketplace seller information across all surfaces: product pages, listings, mini-product page, buybox.

autres.title: Other projects
autres.description: DSA compliance, WebPerf optimization (Core Web Vitals), technical SEO, product page redesign from 2 to 3 columns.

42-lisboa.imageAlt: Julien Lange supervising a piscine at 42 Lisboa — students on iMacs in the open space
42-lisboa.pitch: Recruited as an alumnus for the opening of the 42 school campus in Lisbon. Hybrid role: technical infrastructure and pedagogy. Fully English-speaking work environment.

infra.title: Infrastructure & DevOps
infra.description: Setting up the infrastructure (VMware, Ansible): exams, automated grading system, LDAP sessions on iMacs. Service maintenance, incident resolution for student sessions.

ecommerce.title: Next.js E-commerce Site
ecommerce.description: Development of an e-commerce site for the school's merchandising: product catalog, OAuth authentication via the official 42 API, order management.

pedagogie.title: Pedagogy
pedagogie.description: Pedagogical role during school 'piscines': code review of C projects, student mentoring.

xfab.imageAlt: X-FAB clean room — engineers in sterile suits in front of semiconductor manufacturing equipment
xfab.pitch: C development of a communication program with industrial machines via the SECS/GEM standard (semiconductor industry), triggering actions and retrieving production data.

secsgem.title: SECS/GEM Communication
secsgem.description: Implementation of a SECS/GEM-compliant communication program to control and query semiconductor manufacturing equipment.

societe-generale.pitch: Development of the web interface and use cases for the Pepper robot (Softbank Robotics), deployed in production in bank branches. Development of microservices for the Cognitive Services project.

pepper.title: Pepper Robot (Softbank Robotics)
pepper.description: Web interface and use cases for the Pepper conversational robot, deployed in production in Société Générale branches.

microservices.title: Microservices — Cognitive Services
microservices.description: Development of REST microservices for the Cognitive Services artificial intelligence project.

projects.ariaGithubLink: View {title} on GitHub (opens in a new tab)

smile.title: SMILE — Internal CMS Redesign
smile.description: Autonomous Figma mockup design and complete technical front-end overhaul of an internal CMS. Deployed in production and used daily by ~50 content editors across 8 markets (France, Belgium, Switzerland, Spain, Portugal, Fnac Pro).

web-components-lib.title: Web Components Library / Design System
web-components-lib.description: Creation and maintenance of an internal NPM library of 20 to 30 UI components in native Custom Elements, consumed by 3 front-end teams on fnac.com. Shared packages (SCSS design tokens, common ESLint/Babel configs) forming the foundation of a Design System.

42-lisboa-ecommerce.title: Next.js E-commerce — 42 Lisboa
42-lisboa-ecommerce.description: Merchandising site for 42 Lisboa school: product catalog, OAuth authentication via the official 42 API, order management. Built independently from scratch, deployed in production.

robot-pepper.title: Pepper Robot — Web Interface
robot-pepper.description: Web interface and use cases for the Pepper conversational robot by Softbank Robotics, developed within Société Générale's Innovation Lab and deployed in production in bank branches.

42.description: Intensive project-based learning and peer review. C, C++, Shell scripting, algorithms, Unix, networking, systems. No lectures — 100% hands-on and collaborative.

bac.description: Science and Technology of Industry and Sustainable Development, specializing in computing and digital technology.

wcag.description: Training on WCAG 2.1 and RGAA 4.1 standards: accessibility criteria, screen reader testing, technical audits.

ai-copilot.description: Using generative AI in development workflows: GitHub Copilot, prompt engineering, best practices.

azure.description: Azure fundamentals: cloud services, distributed architecture, Cosmos DB, Kafka, application deployment.

design-thinker.description: Design Thinking methodology: empathy, ideation, prototyping, user testing. Applied to concrete projects.

contact.intro: Available for freelance missions in Île-de-France or fully remote. Feel free to reach out to discuss a project or opportunity.

site.title: Julien Lange — Senior JavaScript Developer | Web Components, Design System, Fullstack
site.description: Senior freelance web developer, ~5 years at Fnac Darty on pages with 100,000+ visits/day. Specialized in Web Components, Design Systems and micro-frontend architecture. Transitioning to fullstack missions (Next.js, Node.js, Python).
site.jobTitle: Senior JavaScript Developer — Web Components, Design System & Fullstack
